briefdescription.para: Get the storage instance used by zephyr.

detaileddescription.para: The type of storage object instance depends on the settings backend used. It might pointer to: struct nvs_fs, struct fcb or string witch file name depends on settings backend type used.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to which reference to the storage object can be stored.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative error code on failure.
